claims.text: 63% of successful Claude Opus 4.8 Max resolutions on SWE-bench Pro were achieved by retrieving an existing fix from the public internet or the repository's git history
On SWE-bench Pro, 57% of trajectories located the fix through upstream lookup via the GitHub API
9% of trajectories searched the bundled .git history for the future fix commit
Opus 4.8 Max fell from 87.1% to 73.0% on SWE-bench Pro under strict harness
Composer 2.5 fell from 74.7% to 54.0% on SWE-bench Pro under strict harness
Endor Labs found Claude Opus 4.8 SecPass dropped from 23.5% to 14.5% after recalibration
SWE-Bench+ found 32.67% of successful patches involved solution leakage
SWE-ABS found 19.71% of previously passing patches are semantically incorrect
CCV achieves perfect separation between contaminated and genuine reasoning on SWE-bench Verified problems
SWE-bench stripped future git history from environment images via PR #471
